zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Mautby於1424年出生在英國諾福爾可盧加姆時，她的父親John de Mautby Esq29歲，母親Margaret Barney24歲。她於1440年與John Paston I在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1484年11月4日在英國諾福爾可享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可莫特比。

nameMeanings.name: Mautby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Maltby (South Yorkshire, Lincolnshire) or Maltby le Marsh (Lincolnshire); possibly occasionally from Maltby (North Yorkshire) or Mautby (Norfolk). The placenames derive from the Old Norse personal name Malti + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Maltbie
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Maltby  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Mautby was born in 1424, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, her father, John de Mautby Esq, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Barney, was 24. She married John Paston I in 1440, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 4 November 1484, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Mautby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Mautby est née en 1424, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John de Mautby Esq, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Barney, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Paston I en 1440, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 novembre 1484, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Mautby, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Mautby 1424 in Rougham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Mautby Esq 29 und ihre Mutter Margaret Barney 24. Sie hat 1440 in England John Paston I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. November 1484 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Mautby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Mautbyが1424年にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで生まれた時，父John de Mautby Esqは29歳，母Margaret Barneyは24歳であった。1440年にイギリスでJohn Paston Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1484年11月4日にイギリスノーフォルクで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクマウトビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Mautby(이)가 1424년 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Mautby Esq(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Barney(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1440년 영국에서 John Paston I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1484년 11월 4일 영국 노르폴크에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 모트비에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Paston I em 1440, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de novembro de 1484, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Mautby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Little Melton, Norwich, Norfolk, England: Little Melton, Norfolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Mautby родилась в 1424 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Mautby Esq было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Barney, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Paston I в 1440 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 ноября 1484 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности маутби, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John Paston I en 1440, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de noviembre de 1484, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Mautby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
